name: Shade of the Cursed Ring
description: The tarnished ring pulses with cold light, and a shadow peels itself from the ground — the shade of whoever last wore the cursed band. It wears a face twisted between sorrow and rage, and its dark blade cuts without sound.
failureConsequence: The shade's icy touch drains your strength and leaves you trembling on the roadside. The cursed ring rolls away into the grass, waiting for its next victim.
